sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value INTEGER);
SELECT list_filter(array_agg(value), x -> x > 3) FROM test_table;
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 1 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value < 5);
SELECT id, list_filter(array_agg(value), x -> x % 2 = 0) AS even_values FROM test_table GROUP BY id;
